-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22unicode%22%0A)%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    reader := bufio.NewReader(os.Stdin)%0A%0A    var n int%0A    fmt.Fscanln(reader, &n)%0A%0A    for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A        texto, _ := reader.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A        runas := %5B%5Drune(texto)%0A        maiuscula := false%0A        for _, c := range runas %7B%0A            if unicode.IsLetter(c) %7B%0A                if unicode.IsUpper(c) %7B%0A                    maiuscula = true%0A                %7D%0A                break%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A        for _, c := range runas %7B%0A            if c == ' ' %7C%7C c == '%5Cn' %7B%0A                fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, c)%0A                continue%0A            %7D%0A            if maiuscula %7B%0A                fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, unicode.ToUpper(c))%0A            %7D else %7B%0A                fmt.Printf(%22%25c%22, unicode.ToLower(c))%0A            %7D%0A            maiuscula = !maiuscula%0A        %7D%0A    %7D
